item.title: Version 2026.03.06
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.06

  • Expanded voice commands — 30+ new spoken formatting commands for hands-free text control:
  • New line insertion — "new line" now creates an actual line break in all apps including browsers, VS Code, and Electron apps (previously sent a raw Unicode character that many apps ignored)
  • Tab insertion — "tab" now sends a real Tab keypress for proper indentation
  • Whisper punctuation around voice commands — Whisper auto-inserts commas/periods around spoken commands (e.g. "Hello, new line. How are you?"); these are now stripped so you get clean output without stray punctuation
  • Soft line breaks — "new line" now sends Shift+Return (soft line break) keeping text as one continuous block rather than splitting into separate paragraphs

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
